# STS2 Invariants

Checked by the scenario runner and simulator on every run (SPEC §14.3). "(M_n_)" marks enforcement that arrives with that milestone.

## I1 — Request terminality

Every request receives exactly one terminal JSON-RPC result or error.

*Exercised by:* scenario runner (M2+)

## I2 — Query terminality

Every accepted query emits exactly one query.complete.

*Exercised by:* scenario runner (M3)

## I3 — No output after complete

No query output follows query.complete for that query.

*Exercised by:* scenario runner (M3)

## I4 — Id validity

Outbound messages never reference unknown, closed, or disposed ids except stable idempotent responses.

*Exercised by:* scenario runner (M2+)

## I5 — Journal causality

seq is gapless; every non-root envelope has a valid cause less than its own seq.

*Exercised by:* CoordinatorTests.SeqIsGaplessAcrossMixedTraffic, EffectFlowChainsCausesThroughTheJournal

## I6 — Secret safety

No raw secret canary, JWT shape, password key, or configured secret appears in any artifact.

*Exercised by:* SecretRedactionTests, VerificationCorpusProducer, verify.sh canary scan

## I7 — Replay determinism

Replay reproduces the identical outbound digest sequence.

*Exercised by:* ReplayTests, sts2-replay verify gate

## I8 — Lease cleanup

Driver sessions/readers are disposed by run end; live lease count never exceeds the limit.

*Exercised by:* effect runner leases (M2+)

## I9 — Backpressure

Unacked row pages per query never exceed windowPages.

*Exercised by:* scenario runner (M3)

## I10 — Stdout frame integrity

Multiplexer output parses to intact frames with no interleaving.

*Exercised by:* MultiplexerSingleWriterTests

## I11 — Dependency boundary

STS2 assemblies reference only allowed projects and namespaces.

*Exercised by:* DependencyMatrixTests

## I12 — JSON-RPC error shape

Response errors have numeric error.code and stable error.data.code.

*Exercised by:* CoordinatorTests.UnknownMethodJournalsAndEmitsStableError, MultiplexerContainmentTests

## I13 — Multiplexer id rewrite

Server-initiated request ids cannot collide across legacy and STS2; responses restore original ids.

*Exercised by:* MultiplexerIdRewriteTests

## I14 — Lifecycle mirroring

shutdown and exit flush STS2 without duplicate legacy shutdown responses.

*Exercised by:* MultiplexerLifecycleTests, StdioE2ETests

## I15 — Config traceability

Every effective config change is journaled and visible in replayed state.

*Exercised by:* SetCaptureTests (config.changed + replay-visible configVersion)

## I16 — State redaction

diagnostics.state and replay state dumps contain no secrets, row cells, or SQL text unless explicitly permitted.

*Exercised by:* ReplayTests.StateDumpIsDeterministicOrderedJson (M3 widens)
